title: The Straw Hats Take Skypiea’s Treasure — Part 5
description: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: We can't stay here any longer!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No, wait! Please wait a moment!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: It seems they don't need it.

summary: The crew enjoys the peaceful aftermath of Enel’s defeat while Skypiea begins turning war into celebration.
